refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns the position of the high 1 bit base 2 in an integer.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Calling Sequence
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis:
bit = lowdisc_bithi1 ( n )
Parameters: n : a 1 x 1 matrix of floating point integers, the integer to be measured. n should be nonnegative. If n is nonpositive, the value will always be 0. bit : a 1 x 1 matrix of floating point integers, the high 1 bit in the base 2 expansion of n

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: This routine is not vectorized, i.e. it does not take a column matrix n as input argument, but only a 1 x 1 matrix.

refsection.title: Examples
